test-method.name: validateManageContactPage
test-method.description: This testcase is to validate that the contact details can be updated successfully from the manage contact page

test-method.name: verifyTheUserIsAbleToLoginUsingValidCredentials
test-method.description: This testcase is to validate that the user is successfully logged in to the web application using valid credentials

test-method.name: verifyTheUserIsUnableToLoginUsingWrongPassword
test-method.description: This testcase is to validate that the user is unable to login to the web application when wrong password is entered

test-method.name: verifyTheUserIsUnableToLoginUsingWrongUserName
test-method.description: This testcase is to validate that the user is unable to login to the web application when wrong username is entered

test-method.name: verifyTheUserIsUnableToLoginUsingInvalidCredentials
test-method.description: This testcase is to validate that the user is unable to login to the web application when both the credentials are wrong

test-method.name: validateManageCategory
test-method.description: This testcase is to validate that a new category can be created successfully with discount group

test-method.name: verifyManageNews
test-method.description: This testcase is to validate that the news can be created successfully from Manage News Page

test-method.name: validateManageFooterText
test-method.description: This testcase is to validate that the content displayed in the footer section can be updated from the Manage Footer Text page

test-method.name: verifyLogout
test-method.description: This testcase is to validate that the user is successfully logged out from the application

test-method.name: verifyAdminUsersPage
test-method.description: This testcase is to validate that the new admin user profile can be created successfully.
